settings.heading: Frequently asked questions
settings.subheading: Everything you'd want to know about AIRA — sizing, materials, sleep, sport, and more.

settings.question: How do I find my size?
settings.answer: Every Aira Kit ships with all four band sizes. Try them on night one and keep the one that fits.

settings.question: Which size for sleep vs sport?
settings.answer: Start a size up for sleep (wider airflow) and a size down for sport (so the tabs hold under sweat).

settings.question: Is the adhesive hypoallergenic?
settings.answer: Yes — medical-grade adhesive, latex-free. Run a 24-hour patch test if you have very sensitive skin.

settings.question: How long does the band last?
settings.answer: Months of nightly use. The band is reusable; the adhesive tabs are single-use.

settings.question: Will it stay on through the night?
settings.answer: Yes — get the prep right (clean, dry, no moisturiser) and most wearers get a full 8 hours, even on side-sleepers.

settings.question: Can I wear it during sport?
settings.answer: It was originally engineered for high-impact sport. Size down so the tabs hold tight under sweat and movement.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Within the GCC: 2–4 business days. International: 7–14 business days.

settings.question: Can I return it?
settings.answer: Unused, sealed kits within 14 days. Start a return.
